allow: Bash(node -e "const { pool } = require\('./scripts/lib/pool'\); console.log\('pool.js OK'\); pool\([], {concurrency:2}\).then\(r => console.log\('empty ok:', r.length\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { loadConfig } = require\('./scripts/lib/data'\); const c = loadConfig\(\); console.log\('qualifier:', c.qualifier, c.qualifier === 1 ? 'OK' : 'UNEXPECTED'\)")
Bash(node -e "const {loadConfig}=require\('./scripts/lib/data'\); const c=loadConfig\(\); console.log\('bonuses missing:', !c.bonuses\); console.log\('roundId:', c.roundId\);")
Bash(node -e "const { loadConfig } = require\('./scripts/lib/data'\); const c = loadConfig\(\); console.log\('bonuses:', JSON.stringify\(c.bonuses\)\); console.log\('qualifier:', c.qualifier\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const r7=d['7']; console.log\('Round 7 exists:', !!r7\); console.log\('Groups:', r7?.groups ? Object.keys\(r7.groups\).join\(', '\) : 'NONE'\); console.log\('Preview:', r7?.extra?.preview\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/r7check.json'\); const r7=d['7']; console.log\('Round 7 exists:', !!r7\); console.log\('Groups:', r7?.groups ? Object.keys\(r7.groups\).join\(', '\) : 'NONE'\); console.log\('Preview:', r7?.extra?.preview\);")

Bash(node -e "const{loadResult}=require\('./scripts/lib/data'\); const d=loadResult\(\); const r7=d['7']; console.log\('R7:',!!r7\); console.log\('Groups:',r7?.groups?Object.keys\(r7.groups\).join\(','\):'NONE'\); console.log\('Preview:',r7?.extra?.preview\); console.log\('A members:',r7?.groups?.A?.map\(p=>p.userName\).join\(','\)||'none'\)")
